question: How does Delta Live Tables handle streaming vs batch processing?
answer: DLT tables defined with dlt.read_stream() process data incrementally as new records arrive (streaming mode). Tables defined with dlt.read() process all data each run (batch mode). DLT pipelines can mix both in the same pipeline: streaming ingestion at the bronze layer, batch transformations at silver/gold. Trigger modes: Triggered (runs once on schedule, like a batch job) or Continuous (always-on streaming). The gotcha: mixing streaming and batch in the same pipeline can cause unexpected refresh behavior as batch layers re-process all data while streaming layers only process new data.
